scripts.build:chrome: npm run clean && npm run bundle && npm run copy-static && node scripts/build-manifest.mjs chrome
scripts.build:firefox: npm run clean && npm run bundle && npm run copy-static && node scripts/build-manifest.mjs firefox
scripts.bundle: esbuild src/content.ts --bundle --format=iife --outfile=dist/content.js && esbuild src/bootstrap.ts --bundle --format=iife --outfile=dist/bootstrap.js && esbuild src/background.ts --bundle --format=esm --outfile=dist/background.js && esbuild src/offscreen.ts --bundle --format=iife --outfile=dist/offscreen.js && esbuild src/popup.ts --bundle --format=iife --outfile=dist/popup.js && esbuild src/options.ts --bundle --format=iife --outfile=dist/options.js
scripts.dev: npm run clean && mkdir -p dist && node scripts/dev.mjs
scripts.watch: npm run clean && mkdir -p dist && npm run copy-static && node scripts/build-manifest.mjs chrome && esbuild src/content.ts --bundle --format=iife --outfile=dist/content.js --watch & esbuild src/bootstrap.ts --bundle --format=iife --outfile=dist/bootstrap.js --watch & esbuild src/background.ts --bundle --format=esm --outfile=dist/background.js --watch & esbuild src/offscreen.ts --bundle --format=iife --outfile=dist/offscreen.js --watch & esbuild src/popup.ts --bundle --format=iife --outfile=dist/popup.js --watch & esbuild src/options.ts --bundle --format=iife --outfile=dist/options.js --watch
scripts.copy-static: cp offscreen.html dist/ && cp popup.html dist/ && cp options.html dist/ && cp -r icons dist/
scripts.lint:firefox: npm run build:firefox && npx --yes web-ext lint --source-dir=dist
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build:firefox && npx --yes web-ext build --source-dir=dist --artifacts-dir=artifacts --overwrite-dest
